name: Release Notes v3.13.6 - POS and Back Office
body:
Release Notes v3.13.6 - POS and Back Office

Release Date: 17th May 2021

In this update we've added some highly anticipated features, including some exciting new Shopify additions, Promotional Campaign features and more! Read on for the summary, or take a look at our Announcements section for detailed information, including examples on how to use the new features!

New:

  • New Promotional Campaign options:
    • "Buys at least" - Qualifying Type
    • "$ unit price" - Discount Option

  • Shopify:

    • Split Fulfilment - Ability to automatically split the fulfilment location of web orders if the order cannot be fulfilled from a single outlet, saving time and shipping costs!

    • Source and Fulfil Location Optimisations - we've optimised the Source From/Fulfil From Outlet selection for more intelligent inventory control

    • Post Codes - We've added support for Post Code ranges in Fulfilment Groups for greater fine tuning of your source and fulfil locations for customer orders

  • POS Alert Configuration - Added new a option to POS Order Alert settings to separate Click & Collect from the count of Web Orders (making it easier for staff to see how many orders require action) 

Updated: 

  • Resolved issue with Browser Stocktake where count was not increased for products with more than 2 additional barcodes
  • Shopify Integration - Disabled ability to reorder Inventory Locations when Fulfilment Locations is enabled
